quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: Practice makes perfect, so I study every single day.
quests.hint: Using a common idiom to justify behavior.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: It is challenging but very rewarding to learn more.
quests.hint: Focus on 'challenging' and 'rewarding'.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: My favorite city in the whole world is London.
quests.hint: Expressing a strong preference for a place.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: I lived there for more than two years long ago.
quests.hint: Talking about past experiences with duration.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: The architecture and history there are absolutely amazing.
quests.hint: Focus on 'architecture' and 'absolutely'.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: I have to wake up early tomorrow for my flight.
quests.hint: Stating a necessity for a future event.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: The airport is far, so I will take a taxi.
quests.hint: Making a plan based on distance.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: I hope the security line is not too long today.
quests.hint: Expressing a hope for a smooth journey.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: We are going to have a picnic this afternoon.
quests.hint: Stating a near future plan.

quests.instruction: Listen and repeat the sentence clearly.
quests.textToSpeak: Please bring some sandwiches and a large bottle of water.
quests.hint: Making a specific request for an event.
